hero.title: Make your <primary>business</primary> work for <secondary>you</secondary>
hero.subtitle: At Prozeso, we build AI-powered automations that handle calls and scale every interaction in your business.

footer.tagline: AI that listens, understands, and acts for your business.

hero.title: Solutions for your industry
hero.subtitle: We build automations tailored to how your business actually works.

moreComing.title: More industries coming...
moreComing.desc: We’re expanding into new sectors soon. Tell us about yours and we’ll tailor automations to fit.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.desc: Turn every call, DM and website visit into a full table—without keeping someone on the phone all day.
highlights: Fewer missed reservations at busy hours
Less time managing bookings, more time serving guests
Clear confirmations so people actually show up

beauty.title: Hair & Beauty
beauty.desc: Keep your chair booked out with smooth bookings, reschedules and confirmations that run in the background.
highlights: Clients book when it suits them, not when you’re free to answer
Fewer gaps in the agenda and last-minute surprises
Less admin on WhatsApp and more time with clients

clinics.title: Clinics & Health
clinics.desc: Make it easy for patients to book, confirm and remember their visits—with less phone pressure on your team.
highlights: Clear, simple booking experience for new and existing patients
Fewer forgotten appointments and late cancellations
More time for care, less time on repetitive admin

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.desc: Turn enquiries into stays with fast answers and a smoother path from “Do you have rooms?” to “See you soon”.
highlights: Guests get quick responses about availability and details
Less back-and-forth for simple questions and changes
More direct bookings, fewer opportunities lost

realEstate.title: Real Estate
realEstate.desc: Make sure every buyer and tenant is contacted, qualified and scheduled—even when your agents are in viewings.
highlights: No more promising leads lost to missed calls
Easier scheduling and rescheduling of property viewings
Agents spend more time closing deals, not chasing people

hero.title: <primary>Automations</primary> Library
hero.subtitle: AI-powered workflows designed for service businesses. Mix and match to create your perfect automation stack.

cta.title: Need <primary>guidance</primary>?
cta.subtitle: Our AI-powered assessment will recommend the automations that deliver the most impact for your business.

receptionist-ai.title: Receptionist AI
receptionist-ai.description: An always-on AI receptionist that answers calls and messages, gives information, and books, modifies or cancels reservations and appointments.

missed-call-auto-callback.title: Missed Call Auto Callback
missed-call-auto-callback.description: Automatically calls back or messages missed callers so you recover bookings and leads instead of losing them.

appointment-reminder.title: Appointment Reminder
appointment-reminder.description: Automatic reminders via SMS, WhatsApp, email or calls before an appointment, with confirmation and one-click reschedule or cancel.

smart-pre-check-in.title: Smart Pre-Check-In
smart-pre-check-in.description: Pre-visit workflow to collect data, forms and preferences and send tailored instructions before the client arrives.

no-show-recovery-fee-capture.title: No-Show Recovery & Fee Capture
no-show-recovery-fee-capture.description: When a client doesn’t show up, automatically follows up to reschedule, charge a fee or deposit when applicable, and log the event.

smart-waitlist-cancellation-filler.title: Smart Waitlist & Cancellation Filler
smart-waitlist-cancellation-filler.description: Uses cancellations or empty slots to automatically reach out to a waitlist or recent customers and fill those gaps.

abandoned-booking-follow-up.title: Abandoned Booking Follow-Up
abandoned-booking-follow-up.description: If someone starts but doesn’t finish a booking or request, this workflow reaches out to help them complete it.

reactivation-recalls.title: Reactivation & Recalls
reactivation-recalls.description: Brings back inactive customers and triggers periodic recalls based on time since last visit or treatment schedule.

review-booster.title: Review Booster
review-booster.description: After a positive experience, asks for a review and routes happy clients to Google/portals while handling negative feedback privately.

billing-and-invoice.title: Billing & Invoice
billing-and-invoice.description: Automates sending payment links, capturing deposits, and delivering invoices, integrated with your billing system.

in-stay-concierge-upsell.title: In-Stay Concierge & Upsell
in-stay-concierge-upsell.description: A virtual concierge for guests currently staying at the property: answers questions, handles requests and proposes upsells.

group-event-inquiry-handler.title: Group & Event Inquiry Handler
group-event-inquiry-handler.description: Specialised workflow for handling group and event requests (weddings, conferences, corporate stays), qualifying and structuring them for sales.

portal-lead-qualification-routing.title: Portal Lead Qualification & Routing
portal-lead-qualification-routing.description: Handles leads from property portals, qualifies them and routes them to the right agent/property with booked viewings when possible.

viewing-follow-up-offer-collector.title: Viewing Follow-Up & Offer Collector
viewing-follow-up-offer-collector.description: After a property viewing, follows up to gather feedback, check interest level, and collect offers or applications.

tenant-onboarding-docs-collection.title: Tenant Onboarding & Docs Collection
tenant-onboarding-docs-collection.description: Orchestrates the journey from ‘accepted tenant’ to ‘moved in’: documents, contract, payments and key handover instructions.

receptionist-ai.name: Receptionist AI
receptionist-ai.headline: Never Miss Another Call
receptionist-ai.subheading: Your AI Receptionist answers every call, books appointments, answers FAQs, and qualifies leads—24/7, in any language.
receptionist-ai.problem: Your phone rings but you're helping customers. Voicemail piles up. Calls go to competitors. You lose 40-50% of inbound leads simply because nobody picked up.
receptionist-ai.solution: Your AI receptionist picks up every call instantly. It greets by name, understands the customer's need, answers FAQs, and books appointments directly into your calendar.

outcomes.1: Book appointments directly—no manual follow-up needed
outcomes.3: Qualify leads before they reach your team
outcomes.4: Track every conversation for compliance & improvement

0.title: Hair Salon Scenario
0.scenario: Customer calls a busy salon at 3 PM. All stylists are with clients. Instead of voicemail, the AI receptionist answers: "Hi Sarah! Welcome to Bella's Salon. How can I help you today?"
0.result: Customer books appointment for Saturday. AI confirms and sends SMS reminder. Revenue captured that would have been lost.

1.title: Restaurant Scenario
1.scenario: Party of 6 calls during dinner service. Host is busy. AI picks up, checks availability, offers tables, and books the reservation.
1.result: Table filled. Customer satisfaction high. Restaurant never stops answering phones.

2.title: Real Estate Scenario
2.scenario: Hot lead calls when agent is showing property. Normally goes to voicemail. Instead, AI qualifies them, answers property questions, and books showing.
2.result: Deal moves forward immediately. No delay. No lost lead. +50% faster conversion.

3.title: Clinic Scenario
3.scenario: Patient calls to ask about availability for a same‑week appointment and insurance coverage. AI answers FAQs and books a slot.
3.result: Patient scheduled instantly, fewer front‑desk interruptions.

4.title: Hotel Scenario
4.scenario: Guest calls after hours to ask about late check‑in and parking. AI provides details and adds the reservation note.
4.result: Guest reassured, staff sleeps, expectations set.

0.title: Natural Conversation
0.description: Sounds like a real person. Understands context, asks follow-ups, never feels robotic.

1.title: Multi-Language Support
1.description: Detect or customer-selected language. Catalan, Valencian, Spanish, English, Arabic, Mandarin—all supported.

2.title: Direct Calendar Integration
2.description: Checks real-time availability and books directly. Syncs with Google Calendar, Outlook, or your booking software.

3.title: Smart Qualification
3.description: Asks the right questions to qualify leads. Transfers hot prospects to your team immediately.

4.title: FAQ Knowledge Base
4.description: Answers common questions about hours, pricing, services, policies without human intervention.

5.title: After-Hours Handling
5.description: Can take emergency calls, store messages, or route to on-call staff based on urgency.

0.question: Will customers know they're talking to an AI?
0.answer: The experience is seamless. Customers don't need to know—they're helped, booked, and happy. Transparency is optional.

1.question: What if the customer wants a human?
1.answer: Instant warm transfer. The AI shares the full conversation context with your team. Human never starts from zero.

2.question: How does it learn about my business?
2.answer: We train the AI with your specific business info: hours, services, pricing, policies, team names, common FAQs. Setup takes 30 minutes.

3.question: Does it work with my existing phone system?
3.answer: Yes. We integrate with Twilio, VoIP, traditional phone lines—any setup. Calls route through the AI then to you.

4.question: What about GDPR and HIPAA compliance?
4.answer: Full compliance. All calls encrypted, stored securely, accessible only to authorized staff. Regular audits ensure standards.

5.question: Can I customize what the AI says?
5.answer: Complete control. You write scripts, define responses, set tone. We train the AI to sound like your business.

cta.subtitle: See how Receptionist AI can transform your business. Free assessment, no credit card required.

hero.title: Take the first step toward a <primary>business</primary> that <secondary>never stops</secondary>
hero.subtitle: We listen, understand your day to day and create a system that works for you, even when you can’t.

intro.title: Tell us your story
intro.desc: Every business has its rhythm. We want to understand yours: how you work, what holds you back and what you’d like to change.

call.title: We design your system
call.desc: We automate the tasks that waste your time—calls, appointments, messages—so your day revolves around what truly matters again.

launch.title: Start to breathe
launch.desc: While you keep serving your customers, the system takes care of the rest. No stress, no interruptions, no lost revenue.

assessment.cardSubtitle: No commitment. Just a conversation to discover how your business can gain time, order and peace of mind.

goals.label: What are you looking for?
goals.placeholder: Briefly tell us what you’d like to achieve...

assessment.disclaimer: We work with real businesses that need time to enjoy what they do again, without stopping growth.

automationSuite.title: <highlight>Every area</highlight> of your business, automated
automationSuite.subtitle: No friction. No manual intervention. Measurable results.

0.name: Receptionist AI
0.problem: You lose 30-40% of bookings outside business hours
0.solution: 24/7 AI agent that handles bookings via voice and WhatsApp, understands natural language, and logs appointments in your calendar without human intervention.
0.benefits: 24/7 availability · Response in seconds · Multilingual · Integrates with your calendar and CRM

1.name: Appointment Reminder
1.solution: Automatic multi-channel reminders at 48h, 24h, and 1h. Clients confirm, cancel, or reschedule with one click.
1.benefits: Automatic waitlist management · Frees up reception staff

2.name: Review Booster
2.problem: Only 5% of satisfied clients leave a review; 60% of unsatisfied ones do
2.solution: After each service, an automatic message is sent. Satisfied clients → Google / Trustpilot. Unsatisfied → internal feedback channel.
2.benefits: Early dissatisfaction detection · Improved local SEO

3.name: Smart Reschedule
3.problem: Every cancellation is idle time with no revenue
3.solution: When a cancellation is detected, the system offers the slot to waitlisted clients in real time. If no one takes it, it fills the gap with internal tasks.
3.benefits: No manual intervention · Compatible with any calendar

0.name: Outreach AI
0.problem: Manual prospecting eats 40% of sales time
0.solution: Identifies leads matching your ideal customer profile, generates AI-personalized messages, and launches multi-channel sequences. Every reply automatically updates your CRM.
0.benefits: Personalization at scale · Continuous A/B testing

1.name: Lead Scoring
1.problem: Reps waste time on cold leads
1.solution: Real-time scoring engine that rates each lead based on behavior (pages visited, emails opened, downloads). Automatically alerts reps when a lead crosses the threshold.

2.name: Follow-up Bot
2.problem: 80% of sales require 5+ follow-ups; most reps give up after 1-2
2.solution: Detects silent leads in your CRM and launches personalized reactivation sequences via email, WhatsApp, or LinkedIn, tailored to each conversation's context.
2.benefits: No lead falls through the cracks · Contextual messages · Auto-disengagement after N unanswered attempts

3.name: Auto Proposal
3.solution: One click from your CRM generates a personalized PDF proposal with client data, their challenges, and the tailored solution. Auto-sent with open tracking.
3.benefits: Visual consistency · Auto follow-up if unopened after 48h

finance.name: Finance
finance.tagline: The money you earned, collected on time.

0.name: Auto Invoicing
0.problem: Manual invoicing delays collection and introduces errors
0.solution: When a service or milestone is completed, the system generates the invoice, sends it to the client, logs it in accounting, and updates collection status in real time.
0.benefits: Instant invoicing · Zero errors · Syncs with your accounting software

1.name: Collections & Reminders
1.problem: 30% of invoices are paid late due to oversight
1.solution: Automatic escalating reminders: friendly at 3 days, formal at 7, urgent at 15. If no response, escalates to the finance manager.
1.benefits: No awkward conversations · Real-time pending invoices dashboard

2.name: Bank Reconciliation
2.problem: Manual reconciliation takes days each month
2.solution: Real-time connection between banking and accounting. Matches every transaction against invoices, identifies discrepancies, and alerts on unrecognized movements.
2.benefits: Books always up to date · Real-time reconciliation

3.name: Budget Alerts
3.solution: Real-time spend monitoring. Automatic alerts at 70%, 85%, and 100% of budget to the manager and CFO, with breakdowns and end-of-month projections.
3.benefits: Full spend visibility · React before exceeding limits · Culture of financial accountability

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.tagline: More content, more campaigns, same team.

0.name: Content Factory AI
0.solution: From a topic or keyword, generates SEO articles, adapts them to LinkedIn / Instagram / Twitter, creates the newsletter, and schedules publication at peak engagement times.
0.benefits: Consistent brand voice · Automatic SEO · Editorial calendar runs itself

1.name: Email Marketing Automation
1.solution: Dynamic segmentation and AI-powered personalization. Each subscriber gets content tailored to their behavior. Sequences triggered by visits, downloads, cart abandonment, anniversaries.
1.benefits: 35-40% open rates · 24/7 nurturing · Continuous A/B testing

2.name: Social Listening & Response
2.problem: 53% of clients expect a response on social in < 1h
2.solution: Continuous monitoring of mentions and messages. AI classifies by sentiment and priority, answers common queries, and escalates to the community manager only what needs human attention.
2.benefits: Response in minutes · Early crisis detection · Real-time sentiment dashboard

3.name: Campaign ROI Tracker
3.problem: Measuring real ROI requires cross-platform data
3.solution: Centralized dashboard aggregating Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, email, and organic. Calculates cost per lead, CPA, and ROAS per channel in real time. Alerts if a campaign falls below profitability threshold.
3.benefits: 360 view in one place · Automatic alerts · Weekly report with zero effort

customerSuccess.name: Customer Success
customerSuccess.tagline: Clients who stay. And buy more.

0.name: Client Onboarding Flow
0.problem: 60% of churn happens in the first 90 days
0.solution: Automatic flow from sign-up: personalized welcome, guided setup, training at key milestones, automatic check-ins, and CSM assignment at the right moment.

1.name: Churn Prediction & Rescue
1.problem: By the time a client tells you they're leaving, it's too late
1.solution: Predictive model that detects drops in usage, reduced interactions, and unresolved tickets. When the risk threshold is exceeded, it triggers a personalized rescue protocol automatically.
1.benefits: Detection 30-60 days before churn · CSM intervenes only when needed

2.name: Auto Upsell & Cross-sell
2.problem: 70% of expansion revenue is lost by not identifying the right moment
2.solution: Monitors usage milestones. When a client hits plan limits or accumulates success with a service, it automatically launches the most relevant expansion offer for their profile.
2.benefits: Opportunities triggered automatically · Offer at peak receptivity · Revenue with no extra sales cost

3.name: NPS & Feedback Loop
3.problem: Annual surveys always arrive too late
3.solution: Continuous NPS measurement after onboarding, each support interaction, renewals, and usage milestones. Negative responses → CSM alert. Positive → automatic testimonial or referral request.
3.benefits: Real-time pulse · Loop closed in 24h · Automatic testimonial generation

0.name: Vendor Management
0.problem: Manual management leads to pricing and term inconsistencies
0.solution: Automates the full cycle: requests quotes, compares offers, generates approved purchase orders by threshold, and tracks deliveries and invoices.
0.benefits: Negotiated terms always applied · Full traceability

1.name: Delivery Tracking
1.problem: 30% of incidents are detected after the client complains
1.solution: Centralized real-time tracking across all carriers. Detects delays and lost shipments, proactively notifies the client, and triggers the incident protocol before they ask.
1.benefits: 360 shipment visibility · Proactive communication · Automatic carrier KPIs

2.name: Preventive Maintenance
2.problem: Unexpected breakdowns cost 5-10× more than prevention
2.solution: Automatically schedules preventive reviews based on usage, operating hours, or calendar. Generates work orders, assigns technicians, and alerts when an asset nears end of life.
2.benefits: Complete history per asset · Warranty compliance

3.name: SLA & Auto Escalation
3.problem: SLA breaches are detected when the damage is already done
3.solution: Monitors every ticket or task with a time commitment in real time. If it approaches the deadline unresolved, triggers escalating reminders and automatically escalates to the next level with full context.
3.benefits: Escalation without relying on human initiative · Penalties managed automatically

clinics-and-health.name: Clinics & Health
clinics-and-health.headline: <primary>Automations</primary> for <secondary>Clinics & Health Practices</secondary>
clinics-and-health.subheading: Reduce no-shows, handle patient intake, and deliver exceptional care coordination.

problems.title: Missed Appointment Calls
items: Patients call but can't reach clinic during business hours
Urgent cases go unanswered or referred elsewhere
No call history = repeated patient frustration

problems.title: High No-Show Rates
items: 25-40% no-show rate typical in healthcare
Wasted clinical time and staff capacity
Impacts billing and patient care continuity

problems.title: Compliance Complexity
items: Manual verification of insurance takes staff time
Missing documentation creates compliance issues
Repetitive patient questions waste clinic resources

solution.title: 24/7 AI Receptionist with HIPAA Compliance
solution.description: Your AI receptionist handles patient calls securely, verifies insurance, and schedules appointments while maintaining strict privacy standards.

solution.title: Automated Pre-Appointment Intake
solution.description: Collect medical history, insurance info, and pre-visit surveys before patients arrive. Reduce check-in time from 15 minutes to 2.

solution.title: Smart No-Show Prevention
solution.description: Multi-touch reminders with confirmation reduce no-shows by 35%. Automated rescheduling fills gaps immediately.

steps.description: New patient calls to schedule. AI answers, verifies insurance in real-time, and collects medical history.
Appointment scheduled for next week. Patient receives secure link to complete additional intake forms at home.
AI sends appointment reminder. Patient pre-confirms and completes brief health survey digitally.
Patient arrives. Check-in is 90 seconds (intake already done). Dr. López has full context before entering room.
AI sends summary of visit, medication instructions, and booking link for follow-up.
AI collects satisfaction survey. Patient satisfaction score improves, referrals increase.

metrics.quote: Automated reminders with confirmation requests dramatically reduced missed appointments.

metrics.description: Time saved daily in admin tasks
metrics.quote: Staff freed from phone tag focus on patient care instead of scheduling.

faqs.question: Is this HIPAA compliant and secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted end-to-end. We use HIPAA-compliant hosting, audit logs, and access controls. Your clinic data never leaves secure servers.

faqs.question: Can it integrate with our EHR system?
faqs.answer: Yes. We integrate with Epic, Cerner, NextGen, SimplePractice, and major EHR platforms. Real-time sync keeps all systems updated.

faqs.question: How does it handle emergency or urgent calls?
faqs.answer: The AI can route urgent calls to on-call staff immediately. You define urgency keywords and routing rules.

faqs.question: Can patients reschedule via text or voice?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Patients can text "reschedule", and the AI shows available slots. Voice rescheduling works too.

faqs.question: Does it support multiple languages?
faqs.answer: Yes. All 100+ languages supported. Auto-detection or patient preference. Critical for clinics serving diverse communities.

hair-and-beauty.name: Hair & Beauty
hair-and-beauty.headline: <primary>Automations</primary> for <secondary>Hair & Beauty</secondary>
hair-and-beauty.subheading: Handle calls, reschedule no-shows, recover missed bookings, and keep your chairs full 24/7

problems.title: Phones Ring Off The Hook
items: Missed calls during peak hours when stylists are booked
Customers hang up without reaching anyone
No system to capture those leads—they go to competitors

problems.title: No-Shows Tank Your Revenue
items: 15-25% of bookings never show up
Empty chair slots waste time and money
Stylists stand idle while revenue disappears

problems.title: Manual Follow-Ups Are A Nightmare
items: WhatsApp, text messages, emails scattered everywhere
No reminders → customers forget their appointment
Late cancellations come too close to service time

solution.title: 24/7 AI Receptionist Answers Every Call
solution.description: Your AI receptionist picks up missed calls, answers FAQs, and books appointments in the customer's language. Customers feel welcomed. You never miss another lead.

solution.title: Smart Appointment Reminders Reduce No-Shows
solution.description: Reminders go out via SMS and WhatsApp 24 hours before. If a customer says they'll be late, the AI automatically reschedules them. Full chair, happy customer.

solution.title: Instant Recovery of Missed Calls
solution.description: The AI automatically calls back customers who couldn't reach you. Result: 45% of missed calls become confirmed bookings.

steps.description: A customer calls during peak hours when all stylists are with clients. Your AI receptionist answers, welcomes them by name, and checks availability.
The AI offers 3 time slots. Customer books for tomorrow at 2 PM. Confirmation text is sent instantly.
SMS reminder goes out: "Hi! Your appointment is tomorrow at 2 PM. Reply YES to confirm or call to reschedule."
Customer texts back. AI immediately offers to reschedule to 2:20 PM. Customer confirms. Stylist is notified.
Appointment happens. Stylist upsells a treatment. Customer books next month.
AI sends review request. Customer leaves 5-star review and mentions specific stylist.

metrics.quote: In a chain of 15 salons, the AI handled over 5000 calls in one month, freeing up staff time.
Clients confirm appointments via WhatsApp. Late arrivals are automatically rescheduled.
AI suggests complementary treatments and books follow-ups before clients leave.

faqs.question: Can the AI speak multiple languages like Catalan and Valencian?
faqs.answer: Yes! The AI receptionist supports 100+ languages including Catalan, Valencian, Spanish, English, and more. Customers can choose or we auto-detect.

faqs.question: Does it work with my booking software?
faqs.answer: We integrate with all major salon booking systems: Acuity, Mindbody, Simplybook, and more. If not on this list, we can add custom integration.

faqs.question: How does pricing work for salons?
faqs.answer: Transparent pricing: flat fee per month + per-call charges. No hidden fees. Most salons pay €150-300/month depending on volume.

faqs.question: Can I customize what the AI says?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. You control the greeting, questions, offerings, and tone. We train the AI with your exact business logic and policies.

faqs.question: What if there's a complex request the AI can't handle?
faqs.answer: Seamlessly transfers to a human. You control when and how. The AI shares the full conversation context so your team picks up immediately.

hotels.name: Hotels
hotels.headline: <primary>Automations</primary> for <secondary>Hotels</secondary>
hotels.subheading: 24/7 guest support, reservation management, and upsell opportunities—all automated.

problems.title: Lost Reservation Calls
items: Calls come in during peak check-in hours
Guests call competitors when they can't reach you
Late-night calls go unanswered completely

problems.title: High No-Show Rate
items: No-shows waste rooms and revenue
Late cancellations impossible to re-sell
Overbooking creates unhappy guests

problems.title: Guest Service Gaps
items: FAQs answered manually by staff
Room service and concierge requests pile up
No follow-up = missed upsell opportunities

solution.title: AI Concierge 24/7
solution.description: Your AI handles room requests, restaurant reservations, local recommendations, and upsells. Guests feel premium service at every touchpoint.

solution.title: Reservation Management
solution.description: Smart reminders reduce no-shows. AI offers late check-in or date changes automatically.

solution.title: Intelligent Upselling
solution.description: AI recommends room upgrades, experiences, and services based on guest profile and booking history.

steps.description: Emma calls to book a suite. AI answers, offers room types and upgrades. She books 3 nights.
AI sends check-in reminder with parking info, restaurant recommendations, and option to request early check-in.
Emma arrives. Mobile check-in already done via AI conversation. Key card ready. Concierge AI suggests spa package.
Emma texts for restaurant reservation. AI instantly books at top-rated venue nearby and books car service.
AI offers 20% discount if Emma books a return stay this month. She books immediately for next month.
AI sends satisfaction survey and collects 5-star review. Emma gets loyalty points and early access to special offers.

metrics.quote: AI recommends upgrades based on guest history and preferences.
Smart reminders and flexible rescheduling keep rooms filled.
24/7 concierge support makes every guest feel like a VIP.

faqs.question: Can the AI handle complex concierge requests?
faqs.answer: Yes. AI integrates with OpenTable, TheFork, and similar platforms. It books restaurants, shows tickets, arranges car services.

faqs.question: Does it work with our PMS?
faqs.answer: We integrate with all major PMS: Opera, Marriott Bonvoy, IDeaS, and others. Real-time sync prevents overbooking.

faqs.question: How many languages can the AI handle?
faqs.answer: All 100+ languages. Guests choose or AI auto-detects. Perfect for international hotels.

faqs.question: Can it upsell based on guest history?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. AI learns guest preferences over stays. If they always book spa, it proactively offers spa packages.

faqs.question: What about after-hours emergencies?
faqs.answer: AI escalates emergencies to on-call staff immediately. For non-emergencies, it logs requests and alerts staff at start of shift.

restaurants.name: Restaurants
restaurants.headline: <primary>Automations</primary> for <secondary>Restaurants</secondary>
restaurants.subheading: Never miss a reservation. Fill your tables 24/7 and eliminate manual booking chaos.

problems.title: Missed Reservation Calls
items: Phones ring during service when staff can't answer
Voicemails go unanswered—customers book elsewhere
Peak dinner hours = peak call volume = lost bookings

problems.title: No-Shows Empty Tables
items: 20-30% no-show rate kills profitability
Tables reserved but never filled
Food prep wasted, staff standing idle

problems.title: Reservation Chaos
items: Multiple booking systems = double bookings and gaps
Manual entry errors and miscommunication
Unhappy customers turned away despite empty tables

solution.title: 24/7 AI Host Answers Every Call
solution.description: Your AI host picks up every call, offers available tables, and books reservations directly into your system. No missed calls. No manual entry.

solution.title: Reminders Reduce No-Shows by 30%
solution.description: Smart SMS/WhatsApp reminders 24 hours before and 2 hours before. Customers confirm or reschedule. Full tables, every service.

solution.title: Overbooking Prevention
solution.description: Real-time availability updates prevent double-bookings. AI suggests alternative times intelligently.

steps.description: Customer calls to book for Friday at 8 PM. Line is busy—your AI picks up immediately.
AI confirms party size (6 people), seating preference (window), and special requests (birthday!). SMS confirmation sent.
WhatsApp reminder: "Your table for 6 at 8 PM is ready. Special: Birthday cake available!"
AI sends final reminder. Customer confirms. Kitchen gets 5-minute heads-up for special dessert prep.
Table is perfectly set. Staff knows it's a birthday. Special treatment makes them a loyal regular.
AI requests review and sends 15% discount code for next visit. Customer books another reservation.

metrics.quote: During dinner service, the AI handled 200+ calls that would have gone to voicemail.
Smart reminders and deposit collection eliminated most last-minute cancellations.
Optimized seating and real-time availability updates filled more tables per night.

faqs.question: Can the AI upsell wine pairings or premium seating?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We train the AI with your menu, upsell strategy, and pricing. It learns which tables to suggest based on party size and time.

faqs.question: Does it integrate with OpenTable or Resy?
faqs.answer: Yes! We sync with OpenTable, Resy, Toast, and other major platforms. All bookings flow to one unified calendar.

faqs.question: What about restaurant-specific languages?
faqs.answer: All 100+ languages supported, including regional dialects. AI auto-detects or customers choose their preferred language.

faqs.question: Can the AI handle special requests like allergies?
faqs.answer: Yes. AI asks about allergies and dietary needs, logs them securely, and alerts your kitchen. Customers feel safe and cared for.

faqs.question: How do you handle peak hours?
faqs.answer: The AI handles unlimited concurrent calls. During peak times, it queues and auto-calls back with priority slots.

real-estate.name: Real Estate
real-estate.headline: <primary>Automations</primary> for <secondary>Real Estate</secondary>
real-estate.subheading: Never miss a lead. Automate property inquiries, showings, and follow-up across your portfolio.

problems.title: Missed Calls = Lost Deals
items: Leads call when you're showing property to other clients
By the time you call back, they've contacted 3 competitors
Voicemails accumulate—critical leads buried

problems.title: Manual Inquiry Management
items: Emails, texts, phone calls scattered across devices
No unified follow-up system = leads fall through cracks
Forgotten property details waste time on every call

problems.title: Showing Scheduling Chaos
items: Back-and-forth texts to coordinate showing times
No-shows waste hours of your schedule
Manual syncing with property calendars = errors

solution.title: AI Handles Inbound Leads 24/7
solution.description: Your AI answers every call, qualifies leads, answers property questions, and books showings directly into your calendar.

solution.title: Automated Showing Coordination
solution.description: Buyers can instantly book showings online or via voice. AI confirms appointments and sends directions automatically.

solution.title: Follow-up Automation
solution.description: After showing, AI sends property details, financing info, and follow-up reminders. No deal falls through cracks.

steps.description: Juan is at a showing. AI picks up a new buyer call, qualifies budget and needs, and proposes 3 properties.
Lead selects 2 properties. AI books back-to-back showings and sends calendar invites with directions.
AI sends property sheets, mortgage calculator, and collects interest level for each property.
AI checks in, offers similar properties, and pre-qualifies for financing.
AI coordinates documents and timelines, while routing complex questions to Juan instantly.
Buyer receives moving checklist and utility setup guidance automatically.

metrics.quote: Leads are answered instantly with qualification and viewing slots offered.
Automatic routing and scheduling keeps calendars full without back-and-forth.
Structured intake creates actionable briefs for sales teams.

faqs.question: Can the AI answer detailed property questions?
faqs.answer: Yes. We load property details (square footage, HOA fees, tax history, etc.). AI answers questions accurately and schedules viewings.

faqs.question: Does it integrate with MLS and CRM systems?
faqs.answer: We integrate with Zillow, Trulia, Redfin, and major CRMs like Salesforce and Follow Up Boss. Listings stay synced.

faqs.question: What about showing coordination across agents?
faqs.answer: The AI manages showing requests from all agents, prevents double-bookings, and syncs with property calendars in real-time.

faqs.question: Can it handle document signing?
faqs.answer: Yes. AI collects documents, routes them for e-signatures, and stores them securely. Perfect for tenant onboarding.

faqs.question: How does it handle international buyers?
faqs.answer: All 100+ languages supported. AI auto-detects or buyers choose. Helps close international deals seamlessly.

metadata.title: About Us — Prozeso
metadata.description: Meet the team behind Prozeso. Born at Google Dublin, we're building AI-powered workflow automation for service businesses.

hero.title: The story behind <highlight>Prozeso</highlight>
hero.subtitle: We met at Google's offices in Dublin with a shared vision: making AI-powered automation accessible to every service business. On October 7, 2025, Prozeso was born.
hero.originText: It started with a conversation at Google's Dublin offices. Three professionals from different backgrounds — marketing, engineering, and sales — realized that service businesses were being left behind in the automation revolution. While large corporations had access to sophisticated tools, small and medium businesses were still stuck with manual processes. That day, we decided to change that. On October 7, 2025, we officially launched Prozeso with a clear mission: bring intelligent automation to the businesses that need it most.

team.title: The team
team.subtitle: Three co-founders, one mission: empowering service businesses with AI.

ceo.name: Cristian Guzman
ceo.description: Leads the vision and growth strategy, connecting Prozeso with the businesses that need it most.

cto.name: Alejandro Gonzalez
cto.description: Architects the technology behind Prozeso, turning complex AI into simple, powerful tools.

sales.name: Carles Vineta
sales.description: Designs the go-to-market strategy, ensuring Prozeso reaches the right customers at the right time.

cta.title: Ready to automate your business?
cta.subtitle: Start your free assessment and discover how Prozeso can transform your operations.
